design_decision: Promote browser-local pinned evidence into a formal SHA-bound receipt and require that receipt in the next authority export.

sources.claim: SLSA provenance is verifiable information about software artifacts describing where, when, and how something was produced.
W3C trace context identifies requests with trace-id and parent-id fields, supporting evidence correlation by stable identifiers.
Google SRE postmortem practice uses preventive action items to avoid recurrence, supporting promotion of informal findings into durable artifacts.
OpenTelemetry semantic conventions standardize telemetry attributes so queries and evidence references are consistent.
